## Summary

<!-- What skill is being added or changed, and why? -->

## Review checklist

- [ ] Description states what the skill does and when it triggers
- [ ] Tested in Claude Code
- [ ] Tested in Codex (required if the skill includes/references scripts)
- [ ] Tested in Cursor
- [ ] No tool-specific extensions used
- [ ] SKILL.md under 500 lines; long material moved to `references/`
- [ ] README skills table updated
- [ ] No secrets, internal URLs that shouldn't be shared, or customer data in the skill content
